data.name: IN HEAT: Lustful Nights
data.detailed_description:
當你閉上眼睛，那畫面便浮現眼前。自從知曉它的存在，你便無數次夢見它：鑽石海峽，那座幻夢成真的島嶼天堂，那裡聚集著美豔奇異的獸人女性，將滿足你的一切渴求。

或許你永遠負擔不起旅途開銷，或許你永遠無法戴上面具盡情縱欲，但這並不代表你無法從另一個角度體驗奢靡。

歡迎開始新的職業生涯。

在《IN HEAT: Lustful Nights》，你扮演一名新入職的保全，身處熱帶天堂鑽石海峽——這裡既是富豪的樂土，也是墮落者沉醉於島上獨有的革命性獸人娛樂業的溫柔鄉。

遊戲包含三種獨特模式，每種模式既有不同的挑戰待你克服，也有獨特的機制等你掌握。你必須竭盡全力，既要保住工作，更要照顧好自己的小命。


警衛室模式

你在公司的第一份工作將在警衛室展開：這是島上設施陳舊的區域，女孩們常在此引發各種麻煩，而你的職責是維持運轉。

請嚴守門戶、保持理智，完成各類小遊戲，抵禦女孩們的侵擾，同時確保自己不被解雇。

若能熬過這些夜晚，你將晉升至第二種遊戲模式：


夜店模式

在夜店模式中，你需要協調女孩們的情欲狀態，同時將她們與客人配對來儘量獲得最高分。

密切關注客人的偏好與耐心，關門攔下那些將你視為最佳解決方案的衝動女孩，確保順利營業直至夜晚結束。

若你證明自己是高價值資產，或許會被選拔參與至更有實驗性的職位。


街機模式

街機模式將帶你進入虛擬世界，呈現動態多變的挑戰。你需要運用智慧應對各類角色，她們各有各的行為模式與機制待你學習掌握。

調動所有技能與資源抵擋模擬攻勢，並解鎖自訂模式，打造專屬挑戰，真正突破自我的極限。


此外……

體驗與每位女孩的全動態劇情場景，還能在自由視角的畫廊中隨時重溫。

參與視覺小說風格的約會，深入瞭解性感魅力背後的個人故事。

每次遊玩都能賺取代幣，用於在轉蛋機解鎖畫廊中的額外場景，或兌換禮物贏取女孩芳心。

鑽石海峽蘊藏著大量有待探索的內容，每次更新都將持續擴充。

唯一的問題是：為了探尋它的秘密，你會多麼深入？而若選擇深入，又能堅持多久？

祝狩獵愉快。

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Greater
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Monterey 12+
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU / Apple M1+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal capable Intel and AMD GPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04, Ubuntu 18.04, and CentOS 7 or similar
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Vulkan capable
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 顯示卡: Vulkan capable

data.name: IN HEAT: Lustful Nights
data.detailed_description:
When you close your eyes, you can see it. You’ve dreamt about it for as long as you’ve known it existed: Diamond Straits, that island paradise where fantasy becomes reality, and where the fantastical collection of beautiful, exotic animal-human hybrid women serve your every desire.

You may never afford a trip there; you may never don a mask and have your thirsts quenched, but that doesn’t mean you can’t experience luxury from an entirely different angle.

Welcome to your new career.

IN HEAT: Lustful Nights puts you in the role of a newly recruited Security Guard on the tropical paradise of Diamond Straits, a haven for the rich and the degenerate to enjoy the island’s exclusive and revolutionary anthropomorphic entertainers.

The game contains three distinct modes, each with their own hurdles to overcome and mechanics to master as you try your best to keep your job, and your body, intact.

Security Office

Your first job in the company is in the Security Office: a rundown part of the island where the girls cause all sorts of trouble while you try to keep things running.

Mind your doors and sanity, perform plenty of microgames, keep the girls at bay, and keep yourself employed.

Survive those nights and you’ll earn your promotion to the second gamemode:

Nightclub

In the Nightclub, manage the girls’ excitement while partnering them with customers to maximize your score.

Keep an eye on customer preferences and patience, close the doors on girls that think you’re the best solution to their desperation, and keep operations running smoothly until the night ends.

Prove yourself a valuable asset and you might just be chosen for something more experimental.

Arcade

The Arcade brings you into a virtual world, offering a dynamic, ever-changing challenge that pits you and your wits against a variety of different characters all with their own behaviors and mechanics that you must learn and master.

Use all of your abilities and resources to keep the simulations at bay, and unlock Custom Night to craft your own personalized challenges to really push yourself to your limit.

Also...

Experience a whole range of animated scenes with each girl, and replay them as much as you like with the free-cam gallery.

Go on VN-style dates to learn more about the personalities behind the sex appeal.

And earn tokens every time you play, and use them in the Gachapon machine to unlock extra scenes for the video gallery as well as gifts to win over the girls’ affections.

There’s plenty to discover within Diamond Straits, and more is being added with each update.

The only questions are how deep will you delve into its secrets, and how long will you last if you do?

Happy Hunting.

Welcome to your new career. Happy Hunting.
data.supported_languages:
English*, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
